summary: Iteration 128 - Custom Email Sequence Visual Builder testing complete. All backend API tests pass (11/11). Frontend UI tests verify the custom sequences section is fully functional, replacing the 'Coming Soon' placeholder.

issues: Welcome tour modal blocks initial navigation - users must complete 10-step tour before accessing Sequences view

seed_data_creation: Created test sequence 'Test Sequence E2E' via UI during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom sequences feature is fully functional. The Sequences view is accessed via sidebar button (not a separate route). Welcome tour must be completed before navigating to Sequences. Backend CRUD APIs work correctly. Frontend components (CustomSequenceCard, SequenceBuilder modal) are properly implemented with all required data-testid attributes.

features_verified.create_sequence: ✓ Successfully creates sequence and shows in grid
features_verified.custom_sequence_card: ✓ Displays with edit, toggle, delete buttons
